architectureNotes: config.js catalog entry: name 'Highlighter', dataType 'highlight', iconClass 'icon-Highlight-words', directive highlightTemplate. dataType 'highlight' is in ASSESSMENT_DATA_TYPES → dropped into a Generic Step column.
Canvas wrapper class is .canvas-wrap.highLight.component-holder (carries the highLight-template directive); the spec widget selector tolerates [data-type='highlight'] too.
Settings panel uses a CLASS (no #id): .highLight-settings-panel, title 'Highlighter', icon .txt-set-icon.icon-Highlight-words.

Header (.sc-intro, ng-model fieldData.introduction) and Instruction (.sc-instr, ng-model fieldData.instruction) are contenteditable, gated by settings.isHeaderVisible / settings.isInstructionVisible (both default true); their holders toggle .displayBlock/.displayNone.

Sentence rows repeat over settings.highLightInfo; each .highLight-text row has a contenteditable .sc-sentence and a .row-delete anchor that is .disabled when only one sentence remains (min_question=1). Add Sentence span[data-ng-click='addSentenceClick($event)'] caps at max_question=10.

The student highlight-selection popup (.highLight-Popup* 'Incorrect'/Undo) depends on a live browser Range + execCommand strikethrough — a Preview/Reader student flow not drivable from the authoring DOM. Author-mode correct-highlight range is asserted via a .cy-highlight-range span marker set on the contenteditable.

Settings checkboxes: #add-activity-restart, #add-show-me, #header-visibility, #instr-visibility (Show Me / Header / Instruction default checked in default JSON; #add-show-me & #add-activity-restart render only when !isGroupActivity).

Outline radios: name='outline' value 'outline' (No Outline) / 'outlineBg' (Outline). Action Assets colour: .colorPickerButton + .colorPickerInputBox (ng-model currSettings.Appearance, default #7eb1eb).
Style panel is shared <stylepanel> (style1 active, style2 'coming soon').
Tags render via <tag-manager> inside .tagsContainer when currSettings.showText is set.
Copy/Delete component buttons come from the shared add-common-hover chrome (not Highlighter-specific markup) — resolved by best-effort selectors and degrade gracefully when not mounted.
Submission lock, persistence-after-reload, network failure, responsive/visual and accessibility cases require Preview/Reader or runtime contexts — deferred.
warning: Not yet live-verified against a running authoring instance — selectors are source-derived from the KITABOO_Authoring templates. A single headed run with AUTHORING_LAUNCH_URL will confirm the drop + settings-panel selectors.
